title: Methods for Handling Multiple Devices in a Computer System
description: A visual overview of the primary techniques a CPU uses to manage communication with multiple peripheral devices.
elements: I/O Devices (e.g., Keyboard, Disk Drive, Network Card)
relationships: CPU communicates with I/O Controllers via the System Bus
I/O Controllers manage specific devices and raise Interrupts
Interrupt Controller prioritizes and signals interrupts to the CPU
DMA Controller manages direct data transfers between memory and devices, bypassing the CPU
